description: Enhance NodesView.vue Cores tab: add grouped config sections (Networking, Security, Performance, Logging), visual danger indicators for risky settings, Reset to Defaults button per protocol, and Restart Service button. Also consolidate shell scripts with deprecation notices.
steps: In panel/web/admin/src/views/NodesView.vue Cores tab: reorganize the protocol edit form fields into named groups using <fieldset>-style sections: 'Networking' (port, network, transport, dns, topology, push_routes), 'Security' (cipher, tls_mode, psk, auth_method/auth_type, cert_id, key_type), 'Performance' (mtu, max_clients, conn_limit, keepalive, fragment, mssfix, idle_timeout), 'Logging' (enable_logs, verbosity).

Add CSS class 'field--danger' to settings that are risky (shell_access for SSH, refuse_chap+refuse_pap for L2TP, comp_lzo for OpenVPN). Style with a subtle red-orange left border and a small warning icon or text hint.
Add a 'Reset to Defaults' button in the protocol-form__actions area. When clicked, it resets configForm to PROTOCOL_DEFAULTS[proto] values. Add i18n key 'nodes.reset_defaults'.

Add a 'Restart Service' button that dispatches a node task with action 'restart_service' and payload {protocol: proto} using store.createNodeTask(). Add i18n key 'nodes.restart_service'. Show a toast on success.

Add i18n keys for all 3 locales: 'nodes.reset_defaults', 'nodes.restart_service', 'nodes.restart_success', 'nodes.restart_error', 'nodes.group_networking', 'nodes.group_security', 'nodes.group_performance', 'nodes.group_logging'.

Shell script consolidation: Add deprecation header to deploy-report.sh (not needed for binary distribution). Add a SCRIPTS.md file documenting which scripts are needed (install.sh, node-install.sh, koris.sh) vs deprecated (scripts/install-node.sh, scripts/install-panel.sh, deploy-report.sh).
acceptance_criteria: Protocol config form fields are organized into labeled groups
Reset to Defaults button resets form to PROTOCOL_DEFAULTS
Restart Service button dispatches a task via the nodes store
All new UI text uses i18n t() calls
SCRIPTS.md documents script purpose and deprecation status
findings: All verifications passed (vue-tsc --noEmit, vite build, bash -n node-install.sh). Replaced collapsible details elements with 4 named form groups. Added isDangerField() helper for conditional danger class. Used form-group__full-width instead of protocol-options__full-width. CSS updated to remove old advanced-settings and protocol-options rules.
